chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 363 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1663/25 2.For orders on o/objections. 3.For orders on CMA 1664/25 4.For orders on CMA 1665/25 5.For hearing of main case 20-03-2025 Abid Ali Shaikh, the petitioner present in person. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner has already availed the remedy by filing Representation in view of Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023, same was decided by the Members Appeals vide order dated February, 3 2025, which order has been assailed by the petitioner in Appeal under Regulation 161 (supra) and same is pending and during pendeny of that appeal, the petitioner has approached this Court. Since the petitioner has already availed his alternate remedy by filing appeal which is pending with the respondents and learned AAG available in Court in other matters while waiting notice of this petition submits that directions may be issued to Chairman, SPSC (respondent No.2) to decide his appeal within 10 days, as required by law after receipt of this order. After such, the petitioner does not press instant petition, which is disposed of in the above terms along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
